title: Rebuild 20 on 11 21 Waterloo Festival
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild 2.0 on 11/21, Waterloo Festival [NO SPOILERS]             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Nov 21, 2009 10:29 pm http://www.wfac.ca/films/8 Probably old news (feel free to merge with an existing topic) and I dunno if anybody here saw it, but Hons mentioned this so I wanted to pass it on.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Nov 22, 2009 1:02 am just came back from the 100km drive IT WAS GLORIOUS I'm so glad I avoided all the spoilers and the shittastic cam rip. I went in with ridiculously high expectations, it delivered on all of them and threw in so much more ;_______; Now then, where the fuck is the BD + Groundwork book + 2.0 Complete Record Collection. I have $300 ready to go.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Nov 22, 2009 1:29 am Glad to know you liked it. (There's been too much 2.0 hate out there. Also, I saw the crappy camrip but I still think the film's 10/10.) I'm curious on where's the release of the 2nd Entry File book myself. >_> Do you know if the subs were the "offical" version linked to in the translation thread?

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sun Nov 22, 2009 2:28 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: There's been too much 2.0 hate out there.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Nov 22, 2009 8:04 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: (There's been too much 2.0 hate out there. Also, I saw the crappy camrip but I still think the film's 10/10.)

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sun Nov 22, 2009 8:38 am Fan-butthurt aside (which i suspect is the leading cause of dislike for 2.0)... well come on, there is no such thing as a perfect movie. Nothing can please everyone, even if one puts away his/her preconceptions of what Rebuild should be like and previously established preferences. Though i have to say, looking at the Rebuild movies with a completely fresh eye is almost impossible, since it deliberately capitalizes on the series that preceded it. And i think it is safe to agree upon that not only is the story different from NGE, but also the general feel and atmosphere of it all, when lined up against the corresponding TV series episodes. Some will welcome the changes, others will think ill of them. And that's without mentioning stuff one may view as issues regarding 2.0's ability to tell the story it wants to tell (i.e.: pacing , which is IMHO terrible) and certain stylistic choices that can captivate some, but again, repel others. 2.0  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Nov 22, 2009 9:58 am SaltyJoe wrote: i'm still utterly envious of people lke TMBounty_Hunter who could watch it in it's intended glory. You lucky bastard.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Nov 24, 2009 12:25 pm People at ANN who were at this screening - whether they were eva fans or not - have been going more than little bit crazy. The general "judgement" is that 2.0 is way better than original. Go figure.

[]:             Quote Post by sean_sean_sean_sean » Tue Nov 24, 2009 12:52 pm Anyone who was there - out of curiosity, did they have subtitles for Kaji's English lines?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Nov 24, 2009 10:54 pm Also, I quote myself wrote: Do you know if the subs were the "offical" version linked to in the translation thread?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Nov 24, 2009 11:08 pm sean_sean_sean_sean wrote: Anyone who was there - out of curiosity, did they have subtitles for Kaji's English lines?

[]:             Quote Post by Licheus » Tue Nov 24, 2009 11:50 pm It took me a whole damn day tripping to and back from Kitchener via Greyhound. But it's worth it - I'm still dazing now, 3 days after! Tortured by the desperate need of watching it again, I downloaded the camrip right away after I got home and watched it straight for another whole damn day.. I enjoy how the story unfolds in a way more straight forward. I remember Anno claiming the Rebuild series to be more entertaining - guess that's how the old boy's mind changes as he ages.

[]:             Quote Post by sean_sean_sean_sean » Wed Nov 25, 2009 5:18 am TMBounty_Hunter wrote: sean_sean_sean_sean wrote: Anyone who was there - out of curiosity, did they have subtitles for Kaji's English lines?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Nov 25, 2009 7:21 am just jap subs for Kaji's engrish. it is understandable after you get past the initial surprise of Koichi Yamadera speaking english and make the slight brain adjustment.

[]:             Quote Post by Kamina » Sat Nov 28, 2009 2:11 am Wish i would of known this was going on, me and a couple of my friends would of road tripped to see this on the big screen early. I loved 2.0, i just feel like it could of been better like most films. I like that they fixed my main complain with 1.0, the lack of character development. They added in more character development and a few fun scenes, but the only scene i utterly hated was the Asuka nude behind the lamp and jar moment reminiscent to Shinji's moment in 1.0 and the series. Just seemed like it was forced in and kinda meaningless fan service, and i like fan service for the most part.
